page.title: DJ Boat Party Marbella: Sound System, Speakers, Sunset

data.meta_description: Book a DJ boat party Marbella with premium sound systems & sunset cruises from Puerto Banús. 12 pax max, skipper, drinks & snacks included. Reserve your floating club now.
data.summary: DJ boat party Marbella combines a private yacht charter with a professional sound system, DJ decks, and sunset views from Puerto Banús. Choose from our fleet of 12-passenger boats, all with licensed skipper, drinks, and snacks included.
key_facts: Premium sound systems available on all boats (12 pax max)
Sunset departures from Puerto Banús (18:00–21:00 typical)
Skipper, fuel, insurance, drinks & snacks included in every booking
Tier B (Mangusta 80): €4,719 minimum 4h, includes free jet ski
Bring your own DJ or request a local DJ via our WhatsApp
Departures from Puerto Banús; destinations: Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande

faq.q: What boats are available for a DJ boat party in Marbella?
faq.a: We offer all 12-passenger boats from our fleet: Mangusta 80 (24m), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m), Canados 86 (26m), Ferretti 94 (29m), and K80 (24m). Each can accommodate up to 12 guests. Smaller groups (up to 10 pax) can use the Pershing 46 or Fairline Targa. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Do you provide the DJ equipment or do I bring my own?
faq.a: You can bring your own DJ and equipment, or we can arrange a local DJ for you. Our boats have standard marine-grade audio systems; for a professional DJ setup we recommend bringing a portable battery-powered speaker (e.g., JBL PartyBox) or we can arrange a PA system on request. Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss specific sound requirements.

faq.q: What is included in the DJ boat party price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) prices start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) is €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. All prices include Spanish IVA (21%).

faq.q: Can we play our own music through the boat's speakers?
faq.a: Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth or AUX connectivity so you can stream from your phone or laptop. For a proper party atmosphere, we recommend bringing a dedicated Bluetooth speaker or arranging a portable DJ system. The Mangusta 80 and Ferretti 94 have particularly good marine audio systems, but for serious bass you'll want external speakers.

faq.q: What is the best time for a DJ boat party in Marbella?
faq.a: Sunset (around 18:00–21:00 from May to September) is the most popular slot. The light is golden, the sea is calm, and you get the famous Marbella sunset behind La Concha mountain. Daytime parties (12:00–16:00) are also popular for swimming stops. Night charters are possible but require advance booking.

faq.q: How many people can attend a DJ boat party?
faq.a: Maximum 12 guests on any of our boats. This is a strict safety limit enforced by Spanish maritime regulations. For larger groups, you can book multiple boats or consider a shore party. The Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, Canados 86, Ferretti 94, and K80 all accommodate 12 pax.

faq.q: Where do we depart from and where can we go?
faq.a: All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Popular destinations include Cabopino (20 min), Cala del Faro (30 min), Estepona (45 min), and Sotogrande (1 hour). Your skipper will recommend the best route based on weather and your preferences. You can also anchor for swimming at Cala Cortés or near the Golden Mile.

faq.q: How do I book a DJ boat party in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp on +34 684 44 94 70. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and boat preference. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Payment is required in advance to secure the slot. Same-day bookings are possible subject to availability.

data.body_html:
Marbella's nightlife doesn't stop at the shore. A DJ boat party Marbella experience lets you take the club to the Mediterranean, with a private yacht, premium sound system, and sunset views that stretch from Puerto Banús to the Rock of Gibraltar. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, a hen or stag do, or just want to party offshore, we have the boats, the gear, and the crew.

All our charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance. You bring the playlist — or we can arrange a local DJ. No hidden fees, no minimum spend. Just you, your guests, and the sea.

Why Choose a DJ Boat Party in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers calm waters, reliable sunshine (averaging 320 days a year), and some of the best sunset spots in Europe. A DJ boat party gives you total control over the vibe: anchor at a secluded cove, cruise past the Golden Mile mansions, or drop anchor off Cabopino beach. The sound carries across the water, and the party becomes part of the scenery.

Unlike a club, there's no queue, no dress code, and no last call. You decide when to turn up the volume, when to jump in for a swim, and when to head back to port.

Our Fleet for DJ Boat Parties

We offer boats that can accommodate up to 12 guests — the legal maximum for a private charter. All depart from Puerto Banús. For a DJ party, we recommend these boats for their deck space and layout:

BoatLengthMax PaxBest For
Mangusta 8024m12Large deck, flybridge, jet ski included
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12Flybridge DJ setup, spacious saloon
Canados 8626m12Largest deck, sunpad area
Ferretti 9429m12Luxury interior, aft deck party space
K8024m12Open flybridge, great for sunset
Pershing 4614m10Sporty, fast, good for smaller groups

All boats have Bluetooth/AUX audio. For a proper party, we recommend bringing a portable speaker or arranging a DJ setup. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) includes a free jet ski — a popular addition for party groups.

Sound Systems & DJ Setup

Our boats come with standard marine-grade audio systems. For a DJ boat party, you have three options:

  • Bring your own Bluetooth speaker — JBL PartyBox 310 or similar works well on deck. Battery life 8+ hours.
  • Bring your own DJ equipment — small controller + laptop or USB. We provide power via 230V inverter on larger boats.
  • Hire a local DJ — we can recommend DJs who specialise in boat parties. Rates from €250 for 3 hours. Contact us via WhatsApp.

For serious sound, the Mangusta 80's flybridge offers the best platform for speakers. The Azimut 58 Flybridge has a large aft deck that works well for a DJ booth.

Sunset Timing & Routes

The best time for a DJ boat party in Marbella is sunset — typically 18:00 to 21:00 (May–September). The sun sets behind La Concha mountain, painting the sky orange and pink. Popular routes:

  • Puerto Banús → Cabopino (20 min) — anchor off the dunes, shallow water for swimming.
  • Puerto Banús → Cala del Faro (30 min) — secluded cove, great for photos.
  • Puerto Banús → Estepona (45 min) — longer cruise, see the coast from the sea.
  • Puerto Banús → Sotogrande (1 hour) — luxury marina, return at dusk.

Your skipper will choose the best route based on wind and sea conditions. All routes include a swimming stop if you want to cool off between sets.

Pricing & What's Included

All prices include skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Spanish IVA (21%) is included. No hidden extras.

  • Tier A (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39): €749 for 2 hours, €1,299 for 4 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours.
  • Tier B (Mangusta 80, all variants): €4,719 minimum 4 hours — includes a free jet ski.
  • Other boats: pricing on request via WhatsApp. Contact us for a quote.

Additional services: DJ hire (from €250), extra snacks/catering (from €15/pax), professional photographer (from €200). All can be arranged through us.

How to Book Your DJ Boat Party

Booking is simple. Message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and boat preference. We'll check availability and send a payment link. Slots fill quickly, especially sunset slots in July and August — book at least 3 days in advance.

Same-day bookings are possible if we have availability. Payment is required to secure the slot. Cancellation policy: 100% refund if cancelled 48 hours before departure, 50% refund if 24 hours before, no refund within 24 hours.

For more information about all our experiences, visit our Boat Rental Marbella hub.

Frequently Asked Questions

What boats are available for a DJ boat party in Marbella?

We offer all 12-passenger boats from our fleet: Mangusta 80 (24m), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m), Canados 86 (26m), Ferretti 94 (29m), and K80 (24m). Each can accommodate up to 12 guests. Smaller groups (up to 10 pax) can use the Pershing 46 or Fairline Targa. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Do you provide the DJ equipment or do I bring my own?

You can bring your own DJ and equipment, or we can arrange a local DJ for you. Our boats have standard marine-grade audio systems; for a professional DJ setup we recommend bringing a portable battery-powered speaker (e.g., JBL PartyBox) or we can arrange a PA system on request. Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss specific sound requirements.

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) prices start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) is €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. All prices include Spanish IVA (21%).

Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth or AUX connectivity so you can stream from your phone or laptop. For a proper party atmosphere, we recommend bringing a dedicated Bluetooth speaker or arranging a portable DJ system. The Mangusta 80 and Ferretti 94 have particularly good marine audio systems, but for serious bass you'll want external speakers.

Sunset (around 18:00–21:00 from May to September) is the most popular slot. The light is golden, the sea is calm, and you get the famous Marbella sunset behind La Concha mountain. Daytime parties (12:00–16:00) are also popular for swimming stops. Night charters are possible but require advance booking.

Maximum 12 guests on any of our boats. This is a strict safety limit enforced by Spanish maritime regulations. For larger groups, you can book multiple boats or consider a shore party. The Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, Canados 86, Ferretti 94, and K80 all accommodate 12 pax.

All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Popular destinations include Cabopino (20 min), Cala del Faro (30 min), Estepona (45 min), and Sotogrande (1 hour). Your skipper will recommend the best route based on weather and your preferences. You can also anchor for swimming at Cala Cortés or near the Golden Mile.

Contact us via WhatsApp on +34 684 44 94 70. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and boat preference. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Payment is required in advance to secure the slot. Same-day bookings are possible subject to availability.
